newsSince: Positive fundamental validation since the prior verdict. Pure Storage's Q3 FY26 beat (+16% YoY) exceeded its full-year 1-2 exabyte hyperscaler DirectFlash shipment plan, raised FY26 revenue guidance to ~$3.64B, and management signaled additional hyperscaler investments for FY27. The Meta co-engineering royalty stream carries near-100% margins.

sources.label: Pure Storage Q3 FY26 results +16% YoY, guidance raised (Futurum)
FY26 guide to $3.64B + FY27 hyperscaler investment (Seeking Alpha)

verdicts.rankRationale: Hyperscaler DirectFlash plan beaten, FY26 guide raised and FY27 hyperscaler investment signaled - the AI storage/data-path thesis is now validated, not speculative. With negative YTD, asymmetry on this crowding-sensitive list improves. Still farther from the passive/power core the page favors.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Hyperscaler DirectFlash wins + Meta near-100% margin royalties
verdicts.primaryRisk: Storage is adjacent, not core passive/power bottleneck
verdicts.bull: DirectFlash hyperscaler ramp beat plan; Meta royalty model lifts mix and margins, validating under-owned AI storage exposure.
verdicts.neutral: Solid execution but storage sits outside the page's passive/power bottleneck core.
verdicts.bear: Hyperscaler design wins are lumpy; product-revenue cyclicality and competition could compress the data-path thesis.

verdicts.rankRationale: On the under-owned-bottleneck master list, genuinely new hyperscaler/pricing data has arrived: Q3 beat, raised FY26 guide and FY27 hyperscaler signal advance the data-layer utilization thesis. Negative-YTD reset plus improving fundamentals support a step up.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Raised FY26 guidance + hyperscaler/agentic data-gravity ramp
verdicts.primaryRisk: Flash pricing and enterprise demand softness
verdicts.bull: Agentic data gravity plus hyperscaler DirectFlash wins make Pure a scarce data-layer bottleneck with improving margins.
verdicts.neutral: Execution on track; thesis advancing but storage still a competitive, capital-intensive layer.
verdicts.bear: Negative YTD reflects pricing/demand worries; hyperscaler revenue concentration adds volatility.
